questions: What is the Lofi campaign schema? (fields, descriptions, and sample responses)
What is the Lofi brand schema? (fields, descriptions, and sample responses)
answer:
Each line: field name, field description, field sample response(s).

- id, Brand profile UUID (may map to organization), 33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333333; 44444444-4444-4444-4444-444444444444
- created_at, Brand profile creation timestamp (UTC), 2025-09-17 18:08:34.359429+00; 2025-09-17 17:53:04.495579+00
- brand_name, Public-facing brand name, Example Brand; Sample Brand
- description, Short brand description/boilerplate, Independent brokerage simplifying coverage needs; Multi-location restaurant with premium offerings
- website_url, Marketing site URL, https://example.com; https://brand.example
- logo_url, Hosted logo asset URL, https://cdn.example.com/logo.png; [empty]
- tone_of_voice, Tone descriptors, empowering; confident; professional; reassuring
- primary_color, Primary brand hex color, #003366; #112233
- secondary_color, Secondary brand hex color, #ffffff; #ddeeff
- purpose, Brand purpose/why it exists, Make insurance simple and trusted; Inspire discovery with memorable experiences
- mission_vision, Mission and/or vision statement, Deliver top-notch service based on trust; Be the most loved neighborhood destination
- core_values, Values list (comma/semicolon-delimited), Service excellence; trustworthiness; responsiveness; client focus
- audience, Primary audience description, Homeowners; SMB owners; high-value property owners; local diners
- positioning, One-line positioning statement, Approachable partner simplifying complex choices; Premium casual brand with local credibility
- heading_font, Display/headline font, Montserrat; Inter
- body_font, Body copy font, Roboto; Source Sans 3
- imagery_style, Photography/illustration direction, Professional and clean; real-life scenarios; diverse representation
- design_elements, Reusable patterns/motifs, Clean lines; simple layouts; trust cues and testimonials
- tagline, Short slogan, Service That Puts You First; Quality Without Compromise
- messaging_pillars, Copy themes/pillars, Simplicity; confidence; protection; trust; service
- logo_usage_rules, Key rules for logo/color usage, Maintain clear space; preserve primary palette; no distortions
- copywriting_tone, Guidance for copy tone, confident; professional; reassuring
- dos_and_donts, Brand do and do not items, Do focus on clarity and consistency; Do not overuse jargon or make unverifiable claims
- keyword_blacklist, Disallowed phrases/keywords, [empty]
- company_name, Associated legal/trade name, Example Company; Sample Holdings
- industry, Industry classification, Insurance; Hospitality; Software
- states, Regions/states for brand campaigns, All; TN; VA; CA; AZ
- monthly_budget, Planning tier for spend, less5000; 25000-50000

Notes
- Samples are anonymized and free of PII.
- Colors are hex; fonts are font-family names; URLs are placeholders.
